title: gazania lanata
intro: Gazania lanata, also known as the woolly gazania, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to South Africa. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, wounds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Gazania lanata include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Gazania lanata is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically as an ointment or salve to aid in wound healing.
